creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Ion-3 window manager has gone from "development" (-ds) to "release
	candidate" (-rc) status, with a release expected sometime soon.

	Analogous to x11-wm/ion and x11-wm/ion-2, it should now be moved
	to x11-wm/ion-3.

Fix: 

Please repocopy x11-wm/ion-3ds to x11-wm/ion-3.
